steps.title: Use indirect question order
steps.content: Calvani asked what Acosta's favorite book was. Because the question is embedded inside a statement, it needs normal statement word order and the whole sentence should end with a period.

steps.title: Keep statement punctuation
steps.content: A uses inverted word order and an exclamation mark. C has correct word order but ends the statement with a question mark. D has both inverted order and a question mark. The embedded question should read as a declarative clause. The answer is B.
